name: DJI Mini 5 Pro
blurb: My main drone—small, quiet, and good for steady photos and smooth video. This is what I use for most jobs.
howWeUseIt: Roof shots from a safe distance
General photos and video when you want things calm and steady
imageAlt: Standard drone capturing smooth aerial footage

name: DJI Avata 2 (FPV)
blurb: My faster, more dramatic drone. Great for swooping through spaces and that slightly more exciting look—if you're up for it.
howWeUseIt: Fly-throughs of gardens, driveways, or venues
Short social clips with a bit more movement
imageAlt: FPV-style dynamic drone shot over a venue
